---
title: "Compartmental Epidemic Models: From SIR to Spatial Stochastic Dynamics"
subtitle: "BIO-007 | Track A — Biostatistics / Track E Overlap"
description: "The mathematical theory of infectious disease transmission. Covers deterministic and stochastic compartmental models, R₀ theory, spatial spread, network epidemiology, and parameter estimation from surveillance data."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Compartmental Epidemic Models: From SIR to Spatial Stochastic Dynamics

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
